backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend canister with data types and CRUD operations for timetable slots, tasks, chat messages, sidebar items, and day entries, using in-memory Maps for storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—light/dark theme toggle and 'Coming Soon' OCR message—to their relevant source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key functionality of components, pages, hooks, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AcadMind app, referencing the PWA manifest, theme color, Apple touch icon, and the React app's main.tsx entry script.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for AcadMind specifying app name, theme color, display mode, and icon assets for 192x192 and 512x512 sizes.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a cache-first strategy for static assets with background updates, skipping ICP canister API calls, and providing an offline fallback to index.html.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in ThemeProvider and UserProvider, registers the service worker in production, and renders the Toaster and InstallBanner.
frontend/src/components/InstallBanner.ts: PWA install prompt banner component that listens for the beforeinstallprompt event, shows an install/dismiss UI at the bottom of the screen, and persists dismissal in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a responsive sidebar, mobile header with hamburger menu, theme toggle, scrollable main content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: Renders the navigation sidebar with links to all app routes, a collapsible Timetable section, and a Gemini API key management panel (save/delete/mask).
frontend/src/components/TaskModal.tsx: A dialog modal for adding or editing a task, with fields for title, due date, and description, including basic validation and async save handling.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes, with a tooltip indicating the current mode.
frontend/src/components/TimetableSlotMod: A dialog modal for adding or editing a timetable class slot, with fields for subject, day of week, start time, duration, and location.
frontend/src/contexts/UserContext.tsx: Provides a React context for managing the user's Gemini API key, persisting it to localStorage with get, set, and clear operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on timetable slots, tasks, and chat messages via the backend actor, plus localStorage-based day entry helpers.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing fonts, Tailwind directives, and defining CSS custom properties for a teal/slate-green light and dark theme with sidebar and chart variables.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Assignments.tsx: Assignments page that lists, filters, creates, and marks tasks as completed using backend query hooks, with a modal form and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/Chat.tsx: Chat page that maintains a local conversation with an AI assistant powered by the Gemini API, rendering message bubbles and a typing indicator with timetable/task context injected.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard overview page showing today's class slots, upcoming tasks, summary stats, and quick-action buttons using data from the slots and tasks query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/DayTracker.tsx: Day Tracker page with a weekly calendar view for logging, editing, and deleting daily learning-hour entries stored locally, including a modal form and daily summary component.
frontend/src/pages/TimetableManual.tsx: A page for manually managing timetable slots, allowing users to create, edit (via delete+recreate), and delete slots organized by day of the week with color-coded day columns.
frontend/src/pages/TimetableUpload.tsx: A page for uploading a timetable image with drag-and-drop support; simulates OCR extraction (currently shows a 'Coming Soon' placeholder) and allows saving extracted slots to the timetable.
frontend/src/utils/geminiChat.ts: Builds a system prompt from the student's timetable and tasks, then calls the Gemini 2.5 Flash API with conversation history to return an AI-generated academic assistant response.
frontend/src/utils/mockAi.ts: Provides a rule-based mock AI response generator that answers questions about the student's schedule, tasks, and study tips without calling any external API.
frontend/src/utils/mockOcr.ts: Defines the ExtractedSlot interface and exports a mock OCR function that simulates a delay and returns randomly generated timetable slots, plus a helper to convert time strings to minutes.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended font families, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes, using the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Defines the overall project state (version 27) for a student academic management PWA with modules for AI Chat, OCR Timetable, Manual Timetable, Quiz/Assignment Tracking, and Day Tracker. Documents architectural notes, known issues, and existing features including Supabase backend, Gemini 2.5 Flash integration, and PWA support.
